False

I think the result will be {1, 2, 3, 4} because the | operator does a union of the two sets. The tuple just holds the sets, but when we do tupleA[0] | tupleA[1], we're combining setA and setB together, which gives us all the unique numbers from both sets. The statement shows a weird tuple inside the set which doesn't make sense here.
